mapper.insert: INSERT INTO writing_metadata (document_id, user_id, mode, study_stage, title_snapshot, topic_title, prompt_text, genre, source_type, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{userId}, #{mode}, #{studyStage}, #{titleSnapshot}, #{topicTitle}, #{promptText}, #{genre}, #{sourceType}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE writing_metadata SET user_id = #{userId}, mode = #{mode}, study_stage = #{studyStage}, title_snapshot = #{titleSnapshot}, topic_title = #{topicTitle}, prompt_text = #{promptText}, genre = #{genre}, source_type = #{sourceType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, document_id, user_id, mode, study_stage, title_snapshot, topic_title, prompt_text, genre, source_type, created_at, updated_at FROM writing_metadata WHERE document_id = #{documentId} LIMIT 1
